allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Day 55: Sprint 8.1 finale — pipeline integration, OCR typo normalization, confidence tiers

Pipeline integration: enrich_grammar_on_text_blocks\(\) wired into OCR pipeline between
two-column merge and classify_and_collapse. Grammar metadata \(parsed_name, line_type,
confidence_tier, components\) now flows to text_blocks and preview_blocks.

OCR typo normalization \(88Q→BBQ, piZzA→PIZZA, bracket noise, WI/→W/\).
Confidence tiers: high/medium/low/unknown mapped from numeric scores.
Fallback OCR hardening: 100% classification on all 4 OCR files \(primary + degraded\).
691 tests across 5 suites, all passing. Sprint 8.1 complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for f in tests/test_day61_cross_item.py tests/test_day62_fuzzy_names.py tests/test_day65_variant_patterns.py)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,''''.''''\); import portal.app as app; app.app.config[''''TESTING'''']=True; c=app.app.test_client\(\); c.post\(''''/register'''',data={''''email'''':''''x@x.com'''',''''password'''':''''test1234'''',''''confirm_password'''':''''test1234'''',''''display_name'''':''''X''''}\); html=c.get\(''''/drafts/1/edit''''\).data.decode\(\); print\(''''len='''',len\(html\)\); print\(''''has_catbtn='''',''''add-category-btn'''' in html\); print\(''''script_count='''',html.count\(''''<script''''\)\); idx=html.find\(''''add-category-btn''''\); print\(''''first_at='''',idx\)")
